rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MATTIE DUNCAN
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 4/6/20. Counsel has advised that the petition must be amended as the other heir has now been located. No proposed order has been provided. A copy of the seller's closing statement must be filed to verify the costs of sale. Original bank/financial institution statements must be filed to verify the ending cash on hand. The administrator did not disclose or address why funds are held in attorney client trust accounts, not in an interest-bearing account, as required by Probate Code Section 9652. Outstanding filing fees must be paid before final distribution will be ordered.
